title: This OpenSource Repo will 10X Your Hermes Agent
summary: Agent Reach is an open source repo that augments Hermes agents with web research capabilities across YouTube, LinkedIn, Reddit, X, and GitHub, plus data enrichment and contact verification via Clay integration. The system uses intelligent routing and multi-source research to reduce token usage while enabling automated lead discovery.
writeup: This video introduces Agent Reach, an open source repo that extends Hermes agents with web research across YouTube, LinkedIn, Reddit, X, and GitHub, plus data enrichment and contact verification through Clay integration. It matters for anyone building agentic lead discovery, since the system pairs multi-source research with intelligent routing to cut token usage. Key takeaways: the repo automates lead discovery, draws on five named platforms for research, and uses routing to limit how many tokens each task consumes.
